definition:
1. to boil, seethe , (Herdotus Historicus), attic: proverbial of useless labour, λίθον ἕψεις (Aristophanes Comicus); with genitive partitive, ἥψομεν τοῦ κορκόρου we boiled some  pimpernel, (Aristophanes Comicus):—;Pass. to be boiled , (Herdotus Historicus) 
2. of metals, to smelt, refine , (Pindar) 
3. metaphorically, γῆρας ἀνώνυμον ἕψειν to cherish  an inglorious age, (Pindar) (ML)
